layer_architecture.layer_2_narrative: Main Theme / Arpeggiator / Vocal Chops (Semantic Core)
layer_architecture.mixing_rule: Subtract 3dB at 400Hz for Layer 2 to let Layer 1 breathe. Sidechain Layer 3 to Layer 1.

the_expansion_set: Wider than the silence, deeper than the fear / Floating in a space where nothing is near
Expanding the horizons of the digital mind / Leaving the three dimensions far behind
Zero-point-zero: the center and the edge / Walking on the sonic, invisible ledge
the_mono_center_set: One frequency, standing at the core / Pumping through the floor, asking for more
Mono-soul, locked to the G-sharp beat / Making the alignment finally complete
Sub-low pressure, the anchor of the soul / Taking the chaos, taking the control
the_spatial_dialogue: Dissolve into the wide / Rebirth inside the deep
The secrets that I hide / The promises I keep

psychoacoustic_purity_v4.anti_masking_rule: Surgical notch @ 2.5kHz on the sides (M/S) to let the lead cut through
